description: Crafted from soft cotton/lycra fabric, this high coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with a shaper plus panel to provide an extra light soft padding at the side of the cup to ensure perfect contouring and exemplary comfort - perfect for the confident you. Ideal for exemplary support through the day.Made of breathable stretch cotton/lycra fabric for enhanced comfortShaper plus panel with extra light padding at the sides for perfect shaping Beautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretchPrinted label for abrasion-free comfortWash careHand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or ironDrip dry in shade
